scripts.cypress:run:desktop: npm run e2e:prep:user && start-server-and-test "npm run qa:start" "http://localhost:3000/api/health|http://localhost:5174/login" "cypress run --config baseUrl=http://localhost:5174 --env viewport=desktop"
scripts.cypress:run:mobile: npm run e2e:prep:user && start-server-and-test "npm run qa:start" "http://localhost:3000/api/health|http://localhost:5174/login" "cypress run --config baseUrl=http://localhost:5174 --env viewport=mobile"
scripts.test:a11y:desktop: npm run e2e:prep:user && start-server-and-test "npm run qa:start" "http://localhost:3000/api/health|http://localhost:5174/login" "cypress run --config baseUrl=http://localhost:5174 --spec cypress/a11y/accessibility.cy.js --env viewport=desktop"
scripts.test:a11y:mobile: npm run e2e:prep:user && start-server-and-test "npm run qa:start" "http://localhost:3000/api/health|http://localhost:5174/login" "cypress run --config baseUrl=http://localhost:5174 --spec cypress/a11y/accessibility.cy.js --env viewport=mobile"
scripts.test:a11y: npm run test:a11y:desktop && npm run test:a11y:mobile
scripts.test:quality: npm run cypress:run:desktop && npm run cypress:run:mobile && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:lighthouse
